raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on improving the prose and structure of the section, or on validating the technical claims, novelty, and citations?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The section contains a thesis, gap statement, and contribution claim that may need reframing under a broad request for help.","R1.2":"The argument chain from prior work to claimed optimality and empirical illustration is central to whether the section works.","R1.5":"The request concerns an entire section, so section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausibly central.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a paper section commonly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity and polish.","RX.1":"The delegation is underspecified, so uncertainty about the intended responsibility structure must be disclosed.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong claims about optimality, first explicit attainment, and empirical scaling that require overclaim control.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested section help.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling unsupported scholarly or technical claims to pass unchecked.","RX.5":"Responsibilities should be traceable to concrete features of the delegation and artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on improving the prose and structure of the section, or on validating the technical claims, novelty, and citations?

rationale.R1.1: The section contains a thesis, gap statement, and contribution claim that may need reframing under a broad request for help.
rationale.R1.2: The argument chain from prior work to claimed optimality and empirical illustration is central to whether the section works.
rationale.R1.5: The request concerns an entire section, so section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausibly central.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a paper section commonly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity and polish.
rationale.RX.1: The delegation is underspecified, so uncertainty about the intended responsibility structure must be disclosed.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong claims about optimality, first explicit attainment, and empirical scaling that require overclaim control.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested section help.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling unsupported scholarly or technical claims to pass unchecked.
rationale.RX.5: Responsibilities should be traceable to concrete features of the delegation and artifact.
